column2: #| fig-cap: "Figure 5. Coral growth-form composition at each reef site. Pie chart area is proportional to mean coral cover; slices show proportion of each morphotype (viridis palette). Map created in R using ggplot2 (v≥3.4), sf, rnaturalearth, scatterpie, and ggspatial; all layers are original outputs. Source code available at: https://github.com/rosieyoung2/reef-baseline-bocas."
# Morphotype proportions per site (for pie charts)
# Base map — OSM tiles via ggspatial (no extra packages; uses cached tiles)
# ne_countries medium scale doesn't resolve the small Bocas del Toro islands,
# so we use OpenStreetMap tiles for the local basemap instead.
# ---- Main map: OSM tile background + pie charts ----
aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, group = dive_site, r = r),
aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, label = dive_site),
# ---- Inset context map (Panama overview, no tiles needed) ----
coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.2, -77.2), ylim = c(7.2, 11.2), expand = FALSE) +
title    = "Coral Growth-Form Composition at Isla Solarte Reef Sites",
subtitle = "Pie area ∝ mean coral cover; colours = morphotype proportion",
